title: Creamy Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African dish with tender fish, creamy sauce, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality oil for best flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the Algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until browned.
Add the coconut milk, tagine sauce, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
